chunks.text: Synthetic Hair Catalogue Catalogue of Synthetic Hairs (last updated 9/2/04 by C. Majidi) Example fibrillar structures from polyimide, polyester, PDMS, and epoxy. While some of these hairs arrays showed adhesive properties, work since 2006 has foc

owed adhesive properties, work since 2006 has focussed on thermoplastics such as PP and PE which have more convenient processing capabilities. This incomplete catalogue is mainly for internal reference. Picture Date Description Preparation 8/27/02
